name: clankers-calendar
description: CalDAV calendar integration — list, create, update, and delete events on any CalDAV server

tool_definitions.name: list_events
tool_definitions.description: List calendar events in a date/time range from your CalDAV calendar. Returns events sorted chronologically with title, time, location. Defaults to today if no range specified.

start.description: Start of range (ISO 8601 date or datetime). Defaults to now.

end.description: End of range (ISO 8601). Defaults to end of day.

calendar.description: Calendar name to query. Defaults to all.

tool_definitions.name: create_event
tool_definitions.description: Create a new calendar event on your CalDAV calendar. Supports title, start/end time, duration, location, description, and attendees. Returns the event UID.

end.description: End time (ISO 8601). Either end or duration required.

tool_definitions.name: update_event
tool_definitions.description: Update an existing calendar event. Requires the event UID (from list_events). Only provided fields are changed; others are preserved.

tool_definitions.name: delete_event
tool_definitions.description: Delete a calendar event by UID. Use list_events first to find the UID of the event to delete.

tool_definitions.name: check_availability
tool_definitions.description: Check if you are free or busy during a time range. Shows conflicting events and available gaps. Useful before scheduling.
